cot_prefix: Okay, let's figure out between what times Andrew could have gone to the coffee shop. Here's what I know: 1. Andrew woke up at 8am. 2. Elizabeth saw Andrew fixing their computer at the electronic store from 11am to 3pm. 3. Jennifer saw Andrew buying a bike at the bike shop from 3pm to 4pm. 4. Anthony saw Andrew buying cookies at a bakery from 4pm to 6pm. 5. Betty saw Andrew watching a movie at the theater from 6pm
